testcase.name: test_get_supplier_stats_as_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supplier_po.py:113: in test_get_supplier_stats_as_admin assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get supplier stats failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get supplier stats failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_po_stats_as_brand
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supplier_po.py:163: in test_get_po_stats_as_brand assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get PO stats failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get PO stats failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_po_stats_as_supplier
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supplier_po.py:174: in test_get_po_stats_as_supplier assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get PO stats failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get PO stats failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
